name: markdown-viewer
description: Markdown Viewer — Chrome extension to preview local .md files with a table of contents. No cloud upload or tracking.
author: Atul Purohit <gonewiththeway@gmail.com>

scripts.package-extension: mkdir -p dist && zip -rq dist/markdown-viewer-extension.zip manifest.json background.js index.html app.js styles.css docs vendor icons README.md
